project.name: Annieif 个人作品集
project.styleDefinitionBrief: Deep-space dark portfolio with warm ink tones, pink accent highlights, starfield atmosphere, serif typography (Cormorant Garamond + Fraunces), monospace technical labels (JetBrains Mono). Editorial, poetic, restrained.
project.designRead: showcase / developer-creator audience / poetic-editorial tone / low density / avoid generic SaaS look

colorSystem.primaryColorRole: pink accent (#f4c2d0) used for emphasis, highlights, interactive states, and decorative elements
colorSystem.brandHuePolicy: free-explore with single accent hue; warm blue (#7ab4d8) used only for links and secondary information
colorSystem.stateColors: semantic status colors for admin: success=#7ecba1, warning=#d8a86b, error=#e06060, info=#7ab4d8

styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: restrained radius: 4px (buttons/inputs), 8px (cards/panels), 12px (larger containers). Square accents via border-left decorations on blockquotes and section headings.
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: Three-font system: Cormorant Garamond (italic display titles, quotes, decorative headings), Fraunces (body text, regular headings), JetBrains Mono (technical labels, timestamps, code, navigation). CJK support via Noto Serif SC fallback.
styleContinuityAnchors.spacingSystem: Generous whitespace with 120px section padding, 64px element spacing. Compact micro-labels at 9-11px with wide letter-spacing (.15-.28em). Editorial rhythm with relaxed line-heights (1.7-1.9).
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: Minimal decorative borders, no heavy shadows. Subtle border (rgba .10) and surface layering. Hover states use accent color bleed and translateY(-1-3px). Active/selected states use accent color with glow (box-shadow).
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: Dark layered surfaces: #0a0a0a base, #13111a cards. Radial gradient backgrounds for atmosphere. Static elements use borders; only floating layers (modals/tooltips) use deeper shadows.
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: CSS-generated starfield with 3 parallax layers, shooting star animations. Noise texture overlay at 10% opacity. Diamond (◆) as list bullet. No icon library.
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: Subtle, slow transitions (300-900ms) with custom easing curve. Typewriter text reveal for hero. Scroll-triggered fade-in for sections. Custom cursor with ring follower.

sharedProjectShellContract.navigationShell: Minimal top bar: brand name left (Cormorant Garamond italic), navigation links right (monospace uppercase), thin bottom border
sharedProjectShellContract.primaryColorSystem: Single pink accent (#f4c2d0) for CTAs, active states, highlights. Blue (#7ab4d8) for links only.
sharedProjectShellContract.typographySystem: Cormorant Garamond italic for display, Fraunces for body, JetBrains Mono for technical/labels
sharedProjectShellContract.surfaceDepthModel: Border-first surfaces, no shadow on static cards, radial gradient atmosphere
sharedProjectShellContract.ctaStyle: Transparent border buttons with accent color on hover. Primary CTA uses solid accent fill.
sharedProjectShellContract.alignmentRules: Centered section heads with monospace labels. Left-aligned body content in narrow column (max 860px). Centered statistics/quote cards.

pages.title: 首页
pages.businessScenario: Personal portfolio homepage showcasing projects, about section, insights stats, notes list, and contact/RSS subscription
pages.visualNorthStar: Deep-space observatory feel: vast dark canvas with subtle starfield, poetic serif hero text with gradient colors, floating above a quiet cosmic atmosphere. The first impression should feel like looking at a night sky through a telescope — intimate, beautiful, and deeply personal.
pages.compositionPattern: Vertical editorial scroll: Full-viewport hero with animated title → thin marquee band → section by section (about cards, projects list, insights stats, notes, contact) → minimal footer
continuityAnchors: accent pink glow on interactive elements

pages.title: 笔记详情
pages.businessScenario: Long-form note/article reading page with table of contents, scroll-spy highlighting, and rich typography
pages.visualNorthStar: An intimate reading room: focused single-column layout with generous margins, elegant serif typography, subtle pink accent decorations on section headings. The reading experience should feel like flipping through a beautifully typeset journal.
pages.compositionPattern: Single-column editorial: back link → date label → large serif title → description → full-width content with h2/h3 sections, blockquotes, code blocks, tables → scroll-spy TOC on the left side
continuityAnchors: pink accent dot decorations on h2 headings
gradient fade on blockquote left border

pages.title: RSS 订阅
pages.businessScenario: RSS subscription page with feed URL copy, subscription options, and full article list
pages.visualNorthStar: A calm subscription portal: clean layout with breadcrumb, centered header, subscription options grid, and chronological article list. Warm and inviting without being commercial.
pages.compositionPattern: Centered single-column: breadcrumb → badge + title + description → subscription URL + copy button → 2-column option grid → article list (date + title + excerpt + full content) → footer
continuityAnchors: card-style subscription options with accent icon squares

pages.title: 笔记管理后台
pages.businessScenario: Notes admin panel with three-tab list (published/drafts/scheduled), search, Markdown editor with live preview
pages.visualNorthStar: A focused workspace: split-panel layout with note list sidebar and editor content area. Clean, functional, with the same dark theme identity but denser information layout suited for editing tasks.
pages.compositionPattern: Split-panel: topbar (brand + status + actions) → left sidebar (3 tabs + search + scrollable list) → right content area (editor fields + markdown textarea + live preview)
continuityAnchors: accent pink for active tabs and save button
Cormorant Garamond italic for editor title
